fisher_vs_angular_control.decision: KEEP angular (diagonal-Fisher gives no material gain; no legitimate distribution family exists for a true FIM)
fisher_vs_angular_control.note: Diagonal-Gaussian proxy, NOT a true FIM. A true FIM needs the embeddings to be parameters of an estimated distribution family, which they are not.

honest_finding: H(x) on layer magnitudes separates benign vs grave (AUROC 1.0) but NOT camouflaged adversarial (AUROC 0.2747 ~ chance). Adversarial veto requires the negation-aware verifiability cue. Quantifies the high-verifiability camouflage vulnerability.
